config.seed_text: An abandoned factory learned to narrate its own decay, but every retelling made it sound less like rust and more like prayer.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.output_text: When I say "the" (or at least part) of what happened on my first day here was that an unexpected event took place or there were other reasons for your sudden departure from reality when you arrived—I had planned long before this trip so nothing new would happen immediately afterward! The final time is very short since many things have been happening all these months without any kind 'consequences' yet another way comes out with no consequences whatsoever; they may be hard times ahead even if one tries anyway... But we will never forget how great learning can come about because once people learn something completely different
